text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 97 

GAP_INP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Gap Coinsurance Standard Retail — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the coverage gap 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE:
